sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13236" key="a)po/moiros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-μοιρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n13236.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forming a branch</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">portion</tr_> of a nation, etc., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:3:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
